top_signals.title: South Korea hits Coupang with record $409 million fine over data breach
top_signals.summary: The penalty is the largest ever issued by the commission for a personal data breach, surpassing the record 134.8 billion won ($88.8 million) fine levied against SK Telecom earlier this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
